description: En-suite double room with panoramic views of Clifden Bay and the Atlantic. Includes full traditional Irish breakfast. Sky Road, Clifden.
name: Connemara Suite — Double

description: Twin or double room with garden outlook and Connemara views. En-suite, full Irish breakfast included.
name: Sky Road Room — Twin/Double

description: Ground floor single or double room with easy access, en-suite facilities, and full Irish breakfast included.
name: Clifden Garden Room — Single/Double

description: Traditional full Irish breakfast: local sausages and rashers, free-range eggs, Connemara black pudding, grilled tomato, brown soda bread, and tea or coffee.
name: Full Irish Breakfast Package

description: Continental breakfast for early risers or lighter appetites: pastries, yoghurt, granola, fresh fruit, and hot drinks.
name: Continental Breakfast Package

description: Guided Sky Road loop walking route with notes from Joan on local Connemara flora, history, and best viewpoints. Approx 12km, suitable for most fitness levels.
name: Sky Road Walking Guide

description: Self-guided Connemara coastal run route starting from Hampton's Rest. 8km loop with elevation profile, water stop locations, and trail notes.
name: Connemara Coastal Run Route Pack

description: Two-night stay in the Connemara Suite or Sky Road Room, including two full Irish breakfasts and a welcome hamper with local Connemara produce.
name: Two-Night Connemara Escape
